name: Masoor Dahl Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil 2 1/2 cups water in a saucepan.
2. Add turmeric, garlic, peppercorns, onion, lentils, and salt to the boiling water.
3. Bring mixture back to boil.
4. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until lentils are cooked and most of the water has evaporated (about 20 minutes).
5. Mash or grind lentils with a little water if needed.
6. Return lentils to the saucepan.
7. Add 6 cups water, then bring back to boil.
8. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.
9. Stir in lemon juice and season with salt to taste.
This soup can be eaten as is or served over boiled rice.
